name: markdownify
description: markdownify-mcp — converts web pages/files to markdown; vulnerable to SSRF and path traversal
notes: Windows setup issue: preinstall.js runs setup.bat which creates a Python venv + installs markitdown — this can take >120s or fail silently. To fix: cd to the npm global package dir and run setup.bat manually, then test with: node node_modules/.bin/mcp-markdownify-server. CVE-2025-5276: SSRF. CVE-2025-5273: path traversal.
